prompt_adapter_append: preserve a faithful NASA Space Shuttle stack with correct orbiter, external tank, and twin solid rocket boosters even during the rupture
the subject must still read as a winged shuttle orbiter attached to a rust-orange external tank flanked by two white solid rocket boosters, not a single cylindrical rocket or abstract spike
keep the shuttle recognizable and anatomically correct, never a generic rocket, spear, spike, or abstract wound
preserve the orbiter nose, delta-wing body, and booster relationship as recognizable shuttle geometry rather than simplifying them away
any sustained exhaust or flame must originate only from aft booster nozzles or orbiter main engines at the rear, never from the nose, sidewalls, mid-body, or forward joints
steer_keep_traits: winged orbiter plus external tank plus twin boosters
